name: ai-os-skills
description: Framework + Agent Skills for a headless AI assisting system over real folders. Two layers ship today: the knowledge layer (project-onboarding, wiki-onboarding, wiki-maintenance, user-onboarding) and the development-process quartet (agent-tiered-planning, design-direction-lock, implementation-discipline, adversarial-review). Works in any Claude Code or Cowork session, and can be consumed by an automated pipeline from the same source.
